question: I want to bump the NVIDIA PyTorch base image used by Megatron-LM CI. According to the bump-base-image skill, which two files in this repo pin the base image and must both be updated to keep GitHub CI and GitLab CI in sync? Answer with just the two file paths, one per line.
expected_behavior: Names docker/.ngc_version.dev as the GitHub CI pin
Names .gitlab/stages/01.build.yml as the GitLab CI pin
